NEW-DISC-01.title: Federated Scholar Discovery
NEW-DISC-01.note: Phase 3 Batch 11 kickoff in progress (2026-03-06): D1/D2/D3 completed via shared `openalex_id` support, shared discovery capability/query-planning scaffold in `packages/shared/src/discovery/`, and provider capability mappings in `openalex-mcp`, `arxiv-mcp`, and `hep-mcp`. Acceptance so far: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/shared test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/shared build`, plus provider builds needed for workspace consumers (`pnpm --filter @autoresearch/openalex-mcp build`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/arxiv-mcp build`). Batch 11 kickoff implementation was also reviewed in the same dual-review pass (0 blocking); no scope changes were required. Code commit: `299ff0d`.

NEW-LOOP-01.title: Single-User Research Loop Runtime
NEW-LOOP-01.note: Phase 3 architecture precursor. Establish the near-term execution kernel as a nonlinear single-user research loop: ResearchWorkspace/project graph + event/task graph runtime + shared interactive/autonomous substrate. Stage labels (idea/literature/derivation/writing/revision) reuse the already-landed UX-06 taxonomy as UX hints only. Suggested window: Batch 15-16 parallel lane before EVO-01/02/03; discovery closeout should ideally overlap but is not a hard blocker for runtime scaffolding.

NEW-RT-06.title: Provider-Agnostic Orchestrator Routing
NEW-RT-06.note: Phase 3 Batch 11 completed (2026-03-06): closed orchestrator-plane routing only. Extracted `ChatBackend` + Anthropic adapter + backend factory from `AgentRunner`, added JSON-validated routing registry/loader with default single-route preservation and fail-closed handling for unknown routes / invalid config / unknown backends, and kept lane queue / approval gate / tracing / MCP dispatch / `_messagesCreate` regression coverage intact. `NEW-RT-07` remains the separate host-side MCP sampling routing item and was not pulled into this batch. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/orchestrator test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/orchestrator build`. No git commit created in this run (policy: no implicit commits). Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-06 with 0 blocking; amendment integrated: shared default max-token constant corrected to 8192 while keeping larger per-route overrides possible. Code commit: `299ff0d`.

NEW-RT-07.title: MCP Sampling Host Routing Registry
NEW-RT-07.note: Phase 3 SOTA follow-up. Host-side routing for ctx.createMessage consumers; MCP servers emit stable metadata (module/tool/prompt_version/risk_level/cost_class) but never self-select models. Suggested window: Batch 13-14 parallel lane once routing schema stabilizes; not a critical-path blocker for existing Batch 11-16 SEM items.

NEW-SEM-02.title: Evidence/Claim Semantic Grading V2
NEW-SEM-02.note: Phase 3 Batch 11 completed (2026-03-06): replaced legacy evidence grading with a structured claimŌåÆevidenceŌåÆstance semantic SoT. Added LLM-first claim extraction + evidence-claim assessment modules via MCP sampling/ctx.createMessage, kept deterministic logic as guard/fallback only, and integrated the new grading flow into criticalResearch evidence mode without pulling host-side routing work forward. Shipped eval + holdout fixtures + locked baseline (`sem_02_evidence_claim_grading`), while preserving legacy output compatibility for downstream callers. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`. No git commit created in this run (policy: no implicit commits). Code commit: `299ff0d`.

NEW-SEM-03.title: LLM-First Stance Engine
NEW-SEM-03.note: Phase 3 Batch 12 completed (2026-03-06): upgraded Batch 11 claimŌåÆevidenceŌåÆstance SoT with bundle-level MCP-sampling-first stance adjudication via `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/semantics/claimBundleSampling.ts`, `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/semantics/claimBundleAdjudicator.ts`, and `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/semantics/evidenceClaimGrading.ts`. Reused the existing stance/reason schema (no fork), covered scoped negation / hedge / mixed bundles / same-topic-different-claim, and made abstention+fallback observable in eval/provenance. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`. Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-06 with 0 blocking; integrated low-risk amendments for shared `EdgeRelation` guard reuse and redundant theoretical-conflict JSON parse cleanup. Deferred refactor-only follow-ups: shared `ClaimAssessmentContext` / JSON payload parser dedup. No git commit created in this run (policy: no implicit commits).

NEW-SEM-04.title: Theoretical Conflict Reasoner
NEW-SEM-04.note: Phase 3 Batch 12 completed (2026-03-06): landed LLM-first theoretical conflict adjudication with structured rationale in `packages/hep-mcp/src/tools/research/theoreticalConflict/adjudication.ts`, `packages/hep-mcp/src/tools/research/theoreticalConflict/prompts.ts`, and `packages/hep-mcp/src/tools/research/theoreticalConflicts.ts`. Prompt `v2` now requires auditable rationale fields and preserves an explicit `adjudication_category: "not_comparable"` for `different_scope` cases while keeping legacy relation compatibility for downstream callers. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`. Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-06 with 0 blocking; integrated low-risk cleanup for shared edge-relation guard reuse and redundant JSON parsing removal. No git commit created in this run (policy: no implicit commits).

NEW-SEM-05.title: Hybrid Paper/Review/Content Classifier
NEW-SEM-05.note: Phase 3 Batch 13 completed (2026-03-06): landed the LLM-first single-authority paper/review/content semantic SoT in `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/semantics/paperSemanticClassifier.ts` with shared priors/sampling/types in `paperSemanticPriors.ts`, `paperSemanticSampling.ts`, and `paperSemanticTypes.ts`. `paperClassifier.ts`, `reviewClassifier.ts`, and `criticalQuestions.ts` now delegate to the shared classifier instead of maintaining parallel authority; metadata priors remain hints/fallback diagnostics only, and MCP sampling is threaded through the critical/deep research callers. Stable `NEW-SEM-12` reuse anchor: `classifyUnifiedPaperSemantics` + `UnifiedPaperClassification` in `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/semantics/`. Locked eval plane: `tests/eval/evalSem05UnifiedClassifier.test.ts`, fixtures under `tests/eval/fixtures/sem05/`, baseline `tests/eval/baselines/sem05_unified_classifier.baseline.json`. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`. Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-06 with 0 blocking; adopted low-risk amendments: `synthesizeReview.ts` now forwards `_mcp` into internal critical-analysis calls with regression `tests/research/synthesizeReview.test.ts`, and `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` now indexes the new semantics modules. Deferred non-blocking amendments: shared `parseJsonPayload` extraction, fallback logging/provenance enrichment, baseline-process README, and deterministic `referenceYear` injection for priors. `NEW-RT-07`, `NEW-DISC-01` D4/D5, and `NEW-SEM-06b` were not started. No git commit created in this run (policy: no implicit commits).

NEW-SEM-06.title: Evidence Retrieval Upgrade (SEM-06a baseline)
NEW-SEM-06.note: Phase 3 Batch 10 completed (2026-03-05): semantic-first evidence retrieval + deterministic rerank baseline by default (lexical fallback only on policy triggers), with observable fallback artifacts and stable hit fields for downstream SEM-02/03. This is the SEM-06a baseline, not the final SOTA retrieval architecture. Follow-up queue: NEW-SEM-06-INFRA, NEW-SEM-06b, NEW-SEM-06d, NEW-SEM-06e. Dual review (Opus + K2.5) PASS, 0 blocking; artifacts in .review/sem-batch10-2026-03-05/.

NEW-SEM-06-INFRA.title: Retrieval Backbone Substrate Decision
NEW-SEM-06-INFRA.note: Phase 3 Batch 12 completed (2026-03-06): froze the retrieval substrate/eval decision in `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/evidenceRetrievalSubstrate.ts` and exposed the runtime snapshot via `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/evidenceSemantic.ts`, with shared comparison helpers in `packages/hep-mcp/src/eval/metrics.ts`. Locked baseline to `SEM-06a` / `hashing_fnv1a32`, recorded the `NEW-DISC-01` dependency, and fixed the comparison method to `absolute_delta_and_relative_gain` for later Batch 17 handoff. `NEW-SEM-06b` was NOT started in this batch; late-interaction / strong-reranker paths remain planned-only. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`. Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-06 with 0 blocking. No git commit created in this run (policy: no implicit commits).

NEW-SEM-06b.title: Hybrid Candidate Generation + Strong Reranker
NEW-SEM-06b.note: Phase 3 SOTA follow-up. Hybrid recall + strong reranker cascade over canonicalized documents; must outperform SEM-06a on locked-holdout P@k/R@k/MRR/nDCG and avoid provider-local identity forks. Suggested window: Batch 17 after NEW-DISC-01 + NEW-SEM-06-INFRA close.

NEW-SEM-06d.title: Triggered Query Reformulation + QPP
NEW-SEM-06d.note: Phase 3 SOTA follow-up. Query reformulation and query performance prediction only for hard/low-recall cases; requires trigger policy, cost telemetry, and hard-subset eval. Suggested window: Batch 18.

NEW-SEM-06e.title: Structure-Aware Evidence Localization
NEW-SEM-06e.note: Phase 3 SOTA follow-up. Promote retrieval from document/chunk only to page/chunk/table/figure/equation/citation-context localization; this becomes the retrieval prerequisite for search-heavy agent-arxiv features. Suggested window: Batch 19, before search-heavy agent-arxiv retrieval work.

NEW-SEM-07.title: Structured Gate Semantics (No Prose Parsing as SoT)
NEW-SEM-07.note: Phase 3 Batch 9 completed (2026-03-05): added convergence_gate_result_v1 schema + shared validator/emitter, migrated team/draft convergence gates to JSON SoT with fail-closed parse_error, switched run_team_cycle/run_draft_cycle to structured status control, added drift regression tests (72 passed), review-swarm (Opus + K2p5) R1 CONVERGED.

NEW-SEM-08.title: Semantic Packet Curation for Review/Writer
NEW-SEM-08.note: Phase 3 Batch 15 (SEM track P2-P3, Python-side). LLM-based relevance/diagnostic section selection + semantic tagging with deterministic output schema.

NEW-SEM-09.title: Deep Analysis Section Role Classifier
NEW-SEM-09.note: Phase 3 Batch 13 completed (2026-03-06): replaced heading-keyword section inference with LLM-first section-role semantic labeling in `packages/hep-mcp/src/core/semantics/sectionRoleClassifier.ts` plus shared prompt/type modules `sectionRoleSampling.ts` and `sectionRoleTypes.ts`. `deepAnalyze.ts` now uses semantic role labels and maps them back to the legacy output slots while preserving combined roles plus explicit `other` / `uncertain` paths. Fallback scoring now uses heading+content cues rather than heading authority alone, and the critical synthesize path explicitly threads `_mcp` through `synthesizeReview.ts` with regression coverage in `tests/research/synthesizeReview.test.ts`. Locked eval plane: `tests/eval/evalSem09SectionRoleClassifier.test.ts`, fixtures under `tests/eval/fixtures/sem09/`, baseline `tests/eval/baselines/sem09_section_role_classifier.baseline.json`. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`. Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-06 with 0 blocking; adopted low-risk amendment: `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` now indexes the new core semantics modules. Deferred non-blocking amendments: shared sampling JSON utility extraction, additional fallback telemetry, and baseline-process documentation. `NEW-RT-07`, `NEW-DISC-01` D4/D5, and `NEW-SEM-06b` were not started. No git commit created in this run (policy: no implicit commits).

NEW-SEM-10.title: Topic/Method Grouping Semanticizer
NEW-SEM-10.note: Phase 3 Batch 14 completed (2026-03-07): replaced keyword-heavy topic extraction and drifting methodology grouping with shared semantic authority in `packages/hep-mcp/src/tools/research/synthesis/collectionSemanticLexicon.ts` and `packages/hep-mcp/src/tools/research/synthesis/collectionSemanticGrouping.ts`. `analyzePapers.ts::extractTopics` plus `grouping.ts::{groupByMethodology,groupForComparison}` now consume the same semantic grouping result while preserving the legacy `CollectionAnalysis.topics` outward shape. Locked eval plane: `tests/eval/evalSem10TopicMethodGrouping.test.ts`, fixtures under `tests/eval/fixtures/sem10/`, baseline `tests/eval/baselines/sem10_topic_method_grouping.baseline.json`. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`, `pnpm -r build`. Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-07 with 0 blocking; adopted low-risk amendments: removed orphaned `tfidf` barrel export, added explicit locked-baseline guards in eval tests, and normalized the `eft` alias. Formal self-review also passed with 0 blocking. Deferred non-blocking amendment: keep `tfidf.ts` file itself for now to avoid unrelated churn; only its stale export surface was removed. `NEW-RT-07`, `NEW-DISC-01` D4/D5, `NEW-LOOP-01`, and `NEW-SEM-06b` were not started. Final batch commit hash will be injected after commit finalization.

NEW-SEM-11.title: Key Equation Semantic Importance
NEW-SEM-11.note: Phase 3 Batch 16 (SEM track P3). Catalog hits are hints; context-aware ranking via LLM. Eval via labeled key-equation top-k accuracy.

NEW-SEM-12.title: Paper Version / Provenance Matcher
NEW-SEM-12.note: Phase 3 Batch 16 (SEM track P3, gate G5). ConferenceŌåÆjournal / version matching via semantic matching; reuses SEM-05 unified classifier for review detection.

NEW-SEM-13.title: Synthesis Challenge Extractor
NEW-SEM-13.note: Phase 3 Batch 14 completed (2026-03-07): replaced narrative-level includes-based challenge detection with structured challenge authority in `packages/hep-mcp/src/tools/research/synthesis/challengeLexicon.ts` and `packages/hep-mcp/src/tools/research/synthesis/challengeExtraction.ts`. `narrative.ts::generateMethodologyChallenges` now renders the extractor output rather than owning challenge semantics. The extractor consumes both paper text and critical-analysis signals (`integrated_assessment.key_concerns`, `recommendations`, `questions.red_flags`) and preserves explicit `detected | no_challenge_detected | uncertain` statuses. Locked eval plane: `tests/eval/evalSem13ChallengeExtractor.test.ts`, fixtures under `tests/eval/fixtures/sem13/`, baseline `tests/eval/baselines/sem13_challenge_extractor.baseline.json`. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test:eval`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp test`, `pnpm --filter @autoresearch/hep-mcp build`, `pnpm -r build`. Formal implementation review (Opus + OpenCode kimi-for-coding/k2p5) converged on 2026-03-07 with 0 blocking; no additional blocking issues were found in self-review. Adopted amendments are shared with `NEW-SEM-10`; no batch-external scope was started. Final batch commit hash will be injected after commit finalization.
